non_canonical_surfaces: historical docs/superpowers archaeology that contradicts the session contract
memory_promotion_rule: If durable knowledge is discovered in provider-local memory, promote it into repo-native docs or issues instead of relying on hidden recall.
hook_parity_notes: Claude has a repo-defined PreCompact(auto) alert hook.
Codex does not yet expose equivalent pre-compact hook parity; warn from status/context surfaces instead.
startup_output_policy: Startup hook output must stay compact: session identity, one runtime/git snapshot, and canonical doc pointers only.
Do not embed ./aos --help, open issue lists, or long workflow walkthroughs in startup output.
